description: User scrolls down the Mortgage Choice home loan comparison page to view more results.
User navigates away from Mortgage Choice to a Google search results page for 'home loans comparison'.
User scans the Google search results, moving the cursor over various links including Moneysmart, Bendigo Bank, and Compare the Market.
frame_description: Google search results page for home loans.

description: User clicks on a search result and navigates to the Compare the Market website.
page_title: Compare Home Loan Interest Rates From 5.19% | Compare the Market

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Compare home loans' call-to-action button.
User clicks the 'Compare home loans' button to start the comparison process.
The page transitions to a loading state with a branded animation after the user clicks the button.
frame_description: Loading screen with a meerkat illustration and progress bar.
